en: Violent thunderstorms are heading towards Hungary: precipitation comes with hail and downpours. The storms may be accompanied by downpours, hail and strong winds in some places, but the weather will gradually calm down at night - reported the...
la: Tonitrua graves in Hungariam tendunt: praecipitatio cum grandine et imbre veniet.
